title: SteeringHookHandle sub-trait + capture/inject API
goal: Define the SteeringHookOps sub-trait used by activation steering / RepE / refusal vector / CAA techniques (INF-3, INF-4, INF-5). Exposes activation capture (read residual stream at any layer) and steering vector application (add a vector at a layer during forward pass). LlamaCppRuntime returns CapabilityNotSupported; CandleRuntime implements (MT-082).
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/steering.rs with SteeringHookHandle, SteeringHookOps, SteeringVectorId, SteeringVector, LayerIndex, CaptureSpec, CaptureResult, SteeringSession. mod.rs re-exports.
implementation_notes: Per spec §4.7.1c (Activation Steering PRODUCTION; ref Zou 2023 arXiv:2310.01405) the steering hooks are the substrate for RepE, refusal vector, CAA. SteeringHookOps trait methods: `async fn capture(&self, spec: CaptureSpec) -> Result<CaptureResult, ModelRuntimeError>` — runs a forward pass on the supplied prompt batch and returns layer activations at `spec.layers: Vec<LayerIndex>` (resid_stream by default); `async fn register_vector(&self, vec: SteeringVector) -> Result<SteeringVectorId, ModelRuntimeError>` — registers a steering vector for runtime application; `fn list_vectors(&self) -> Vec<SteeringVectorMeta>`; `async fn set_active(&self, ids: Vec<SteeringVectorId>) -> Result<(), ModelRuntimeError>` — vectors in the list apply during subsequent generate calls; `async fn unregister(&self, id: SteeringVectorId) -> Result<(), ModelRuntimeError>`. SteeringVectorId = Uuid v7 (HBR-INT-008). SteeringVector: `{ id_proposed: Option<SteeringVectorId>, name: String, layer: LayerIndex, hook_point: HookPoint (enum ResidStream|MlpOut|AttnOut), values: Vec<f32>, intensity: f32 (clamped -10.0..=10.0 via try_new), description: String, derivation_provenance: SteeringProvenance }`. SteeringProvenance enum: `Manual { author: String, notes: String }`, `Contrastive { positive_prompts: Vec<String>, negative_prompts: Vec<String>, technique: ContrastiveTechnique (CAA|RefusalVector|RepE) }`. CaptureSpec: `{ prompts: Vec<String>, layers: Vec<LayerIndex>, hook_point: HookPoint }`. CaptureResult: `{ activations: BTreeMap<LayerIndex, Vec<Vec<f32>>>, tokens_seen: u32 }`. LlamaCppRuntime's stub impl returns `Err(CapabilityNotSupported { capability: "activation_steering".into(), adapter: "LlamaCpp".into() })`. CandleRuntime implements concretely in MT-082.
risk_if_missed: Activation steering / refusal vector / CAA have no trait substrate; each technique reinvents capture/inject plumbing.
validator_focus: Trait is object-safe; SteeringVectorId mints via now_v7(); intensity clamp via try_new; provenance field is required (cannot register an unprovenanced steering vector).

minimum_controls: Unprovenanced steering vector rejected at register_vector.
